title: Israeli Soldiers Sentenced to Jail for Damaging Jesus Statue in Lebanon
summary_full: A statue of the crucifixion of Christ has been replaced after one soldier photographed another swinging what looked like a sledgehammer at its head.
summary_public: A statue of the crucifixion of Christ has been replaced after one soldier photographed another swinging what looked like a sledgehammer at its head.
